name: Lantern Relay

players.names: Local turn labels only. Any three distinct short marks are accepted.

phases.rule: Each player contributes one unique two-to-six-word fictional object.
Each player writes an eight-to-twenty-eight-word law for an assigned object, mentions it exactly, and includes must, cannot, or always.
Each player connects two assigned objects in ten-to-thirty-five words, mentions both exactly, and includes because.

outcome.artifact: One plain-text world containing all seeds, laws, and weaves with player attribution.
outcome.stopping: Stop party is available throughout. A stopped game gathers the partial artifact without penalty.

privacy.game_state: JavaScript memory in the current browser tab only.
privacy.clipboard: The complete attributed world is copied only after the player activates Copy the world.

doctrine: Nobody wins it; everybody makes it. Walking past is honored.
